scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "bun run --cwd apps/api dev" "bun run --cwd apps/web dev"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd apps/api build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/shared test && bun run --cwd apps/api test && bun run --cwd apps/web test
